description: A patient record for 'Bernadette SOUBIROUS' (born 1954-02-18) was accidentally deleted from the live database. Restore only this specific patient's data from the backup file at '~/Documents/medintux_backup.sql' into the 'DrTuxTest' database. The patient must be restored with their original database ID (GUID) to preserve historical links without overwriting or modifying any other patient data.
